string 2: Now, then. Are you ready to go?
Yes, I know the Dark Field is safe as long as you're here.

Hmph. Very well, then. Destiny is much like a dark void...
Not even I can see everything.
{next}Is it okay to enter?
{next}What're you talking about?
{next}I feel like you're talking in code.

You have already entered, have you not? In any case, it is
fine.
I am talking about what has happened, and what shall happen.

Hahaha... I suppose I am. However, it is nothing untoward.
Would you like to hear it?

I'm heading to the human world once more. I've got important
business to attend to.

We met before in the human world. Remember? It appears that
Craniamon is doing well.
{next}I understand.
{next}What's this important business?
{next}Were you the one eating the crepe?

That's right... Do as you're told and I'll give you a ticket
to a sweets buffet.
You see, the Shinjuku Sweets Festival is due to start soon.
Yes, that was me. I fit in rather well, don't you think?

The human world is currently in chaos, and I imagine
something is bound to happen.

That is why I am sending this undercover agent, to be
present when signs are revealed.
I can't wait! Pudding, cakes and crepes...!

However, it seems the sweet treats of the human world have a
certain allure...

I'm feeling good, so I want to share my happiness! Help
yourself! You deserve it!
...Hm? Was there something else you need to discuss?
{next}You seem surprisingly mild-mannered.
{next}War should be avoided at all costs.
{next}Don't you want to visit the human world?

You think so? I always try to be calm. I must be ready to
make vital decisions at any time.

Some conflicts are unavoidable, whether for pride, or to
protect whatever you hold dear.

There is no need. I know that Imperialdramon will tell me
all about it anyway.

You seem rather disappointed by our meeting, as if you
expected something more dramatic.

I believe you have a sweets festival to go to? You should
probably be on your way.

That Digimon simply loves its sweets. I think this trip is
for pleasure as much as work.
Hey! Did you read my message? Listen to this!

I'm sensing a powerful aura coming from Lord Plutomon's
castle. I wonder what that's about, kehehe...

Actually, I didn't have the courage to go inside...
So, why don't you go and see for yourself, boo!
{next}Okay.
{next}Why can't you go?
{next}I don't see any aura.
Th-Thanks, kehehe! You're really helping me out, here!

I'm scared that if I get too close to Lord Plutomon, I'll
vanish like smoke in the wind!

I can't see it, either, kehehe. It's more of, like, you
know... a feeling!

I'll leave it to you, boo! Find out what's happening in
Lord Plutomon's castle for me.

Good luck to you, kehehe! Enter the castle and see
what happened to Lord Plutomon, all right?

Boo! Oh, y-you actually went in there?! So, how was
Lord Plutomon?
{next}Imperialdramon: Fighter Mode was there.
{next}Lord Plutomon was in a secret meeting.
{next}He was discussing the Shinjuku Sweets Festival.

S-Seriously?! That would explain the aura coming from
the castle, kehehe...

You made it out in one piece, boo! You're lucky Lord
Plutomon is so lenient, kehehe.

Pudding, cake, Shinjuku? I don't get it, but it must have
been important.

I'm so glad that Lord Plutomon isn't in any trouble.
Well, that's enough for me, kehehe.

I couldn't have done this on my own.
Here... This is for you, boo!

I'm kind of tired, so I think I'll skedaddle, kehehe!
Thanks again for everything.
